name: button-cta
purpose: Primary, secondary, and floating mobile CTA button variants

primary.class: bg-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-800 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-semibold transition-colors
primary.use: Main conversion action — Order Now, Reserve Pickup

secondary.class: border border-slate-300 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-semibold

large_primary.class: bg-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-800 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-2xl font-semibold text-lg transition-colors
large_primary.use: Final CTA section — needs more visual weight

floating_mobile.class: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-amber-700 text-white py-4 text-center font-semibold md:hidden z-50
